headline: The Cigna Group Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: The Board of Directors of The Cigna Group (NYSE: CI) today declared a cash dividend of $1.56 per share of its common stock, payable on September 23, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on September 8, 2026.

headline: Chubb Slips On Earnings Day, But Analysts Bet On Its Global Moat
summary: Chubb reported in-line Q2 results, but P&C premiums and major account weakness are concerns. Analysts remain neutral to bullish.
